ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was created or registered in the system */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the facility's information was last modified */,
  "facility_image" TEXT /* Image URL or reference for the facility */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "facility_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location_within_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location within the facility where the sensor is installed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor's current status */,
  "sensor_image" TEXT /* Image URL or reference for the sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES sensor_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_within_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_within_facility_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the location is found */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Apparent temperature (feels like) reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed reading in meters per second */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Usage count (e.g., number of visitors, users, interactions) */,
  "reading_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_image" TEXT /* Image URL or reference for the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_archives" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archived data entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "archive_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the archived data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Apparent temperature (feels like) reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed reading in meters per second */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Usage count (e.g., number of visitors, users, interactions) */,
  "archive_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the archived data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_archives_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_archives_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-100) */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Issues found in the data (e.g., sensor malfunction, data anomaly) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the maintenance was performed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
